name: POSEIDON
author: GeneralDussDuss
description: Commander of the Deep — keyboard-first pentesting firmware for M5Stack Cardputer-Adv. 163 features across WiFi / BLE / sub-GHz / 2.4 GHz / LoRa / IR / RJ45. Argus — the watchful mood-sprite gotchi. Six themes (POSEIDON / MATRIX / E-INK / SYNTHWAVE / PHANTOM / BLOOD) + ambient procedural motion. SaltyJack LAN arsenal (DHCP starve, Responder, WPAD, on-device NTLMv2 cracker). TRIDENT (ESP32-C5 satellite over ESP-NOW) for 5 GHz deauth, Zigbee sniff, PMKID capture.

firmware.name: POSEIDON v0.6.3
firmware.description: Hotfix on top of v0.6.2. Deauth now reliably transmits — fixed a NO_MEM buffer issue that was silently dropping ~half the frames, so handshake capture works now. Spectrum analyzer flat-line fixed (re-enters RX after each frequency hop). Removed the Argus lightning/glitch overlays that bled over his face.

firmware.name: POSEIDON v0.6.2
firmware.description: Sub-GHz analyzer overhaul: new peak-hold, radar scope, persistence and blip-sonar visual modes plus a full-screen waterfall, all in a neon palette. Argus (the handshake-hunter gotchi) now hunts 5 GHz handshakes through the TRIDENT C5 satellite, and got a proper cursed-demigod character pass. Mass Storage mode reads the SD over USB. Stability: fixed NimBLE heap-leak reboots in Defensive Monitor + Drone Remote ID, plus a Defensive Monitor BLE-phase heap guard. New gas-station and drug-store sub-GHz signal categories. Full website + docs refresh.

firmware.name: POSEIDON v0.6.1
firmware.description: Built-in sub-GHz library — 40 baked OOK signals across Cars / Pranks / Tesla / Home Auto categories. Tesla Charge Port + Frunk, garage codes (Princeton / CAME / NICE / Linear / Holtek / Multicode / Stanley / Liftmaster), doorbells, restaurant pagers, novelty bursts, wireless outlet packs + master ALL ON/OFF, ceiling fan controls, smoke + window + PIR + glass-break sensor alerts. ON-AIR TX indicator with big red badge + frequency + play counter overlays the broadcast screen for every transmit. Hydra RF hat pre-flight — six pre-arrival fixes audited against Bruce, bmorcelli's SmartRC fork, and PINGEQUA pin reference (nRF24 off the display bus, CC1101 reclaims pin 13 from GPS UART, Init() return checked, Bruce's 6-pipe mousejack noise table, RMT 3 us min pulse).

firmware.name: POSEIDON v0.6.0
firmware.description: Biggest drop since 0.5. Argus mood-sprite gotchi (96x96 RGB565, 12 moods). Six themes + ambient procedural motion + 7 idle screensavers + carousel menu. Raw-IDF AP path (Portal, Beacon Spam, Evil Twin all work on Bruce libs). BLE cooperative tick (Sour Apple, Spam, Karma fire correctly). IR LED polarity fixed + full Samsung Smart Remote keymap verified. New features: AP Signal Test, Evil Twin, BLE BlueDucky, SATCOM Tracker, Drone Remote ID, Surveillance Hunter, Defensive Monitor, four nRF52 hat features. C5 protocol v3 with 5G scan terminator fix.

firmware.name: POSEIDON v0.5.0
firmware.description: TRIDENT (ESP32-C5 satellite) over ESP-NOW — 5 GHz deauth, Zigbee sniffer, PMKID capture, dual-band scan. LoRa SX1262 works end-to-end on CAP-LoRa1262. Flicker eliminated across every live/scan screen. M5 Launcher partition env ships alongside.

firmware.name: POSEIDON v0.4.3
firmware.description: Sub-GHz record / replay / broadcast now actually transmit. Migrated to new rmt_tx.h / rmt_rx.h API — the three features silently stubbed since v0.4.0 finally work.

firmware.name: POSEIDON v0.4.2
firmware.description: Three-tier polish pass: scan CSV export, BLE-scan->WhisperPair hotchain, MouseJack custom text, portal cred overlay, shared state globals (wardrive/subghz/nrf24), in-feature ? help, TRIDENT loot+status commands, Meshtastic !poseidon parser, sub-GHz jam detect, unified HUNT submenu. Theme NVS persistence + WhisperPair scan UUID fixes.

firmware.name: POSEIDON v0.4.1
firmware.description: Adds WhisperPair probe (CVE-2025-36911) — Fast Pair accessory scanner with real secp256r1 ECDH + AES-128-ECB response decryption to extract BR/EDR MAC on vulnerable targets. Plus everything in v0.4.0.

firmware.name: POSEIDON v0.4.0
firmware.description: Full factory image. Deauth actually lands on-air (ieee80211_raw_frame_sanity_check override). NimBLE 2.x migration. SaltyJack LAN suite featured.
